title: GET_SERVERS
text: GET_SERVERS Get static information about servers registered with the Uniface Router. operation GET_SERVERS params string Using : IN ; (C1) string Host : IN ; (C256) string User : IN ; (C40) string UST : IN ; (C20) entity URSERVERS.UROUTMON : OUT endparams Parameters Using —code indicating how the servers are identified; one of: S for servers with the specified host name, UST, and/or user name. C for servers used by clients with the specified host name, UST,and/or user name. Host —host name of the client or server. User —user name of the client or server. UST —Uniface Server Type (UST) of the client or server. URSERVERS.UROUTMON—multiple occurrences of entity URSERVERS.UROUTMON, containing server information. Table 1. URSERVERS.UROUTMON entity Fieldname Packing Code Data Type Description srvid I4 Numeric Unique server identification, primary key pid I4 Numeric Server process identification ust C20 String Uniface server type (UST) user C40 String O/S user name host C256 String Host name / IP address startstamp E5 Datetime Server started at dd-mmm-yyyy hh:mm:ss connet C3 String Connection network to Uniface Router (e.g. TCP ) conaddr C8 String Connection address on Uniface Router (e.g. the port number) server C80 String Server or hop or 'Any' server, for example: ora:|u|p /ex /su or tcp:h|u|p or ANY maxsrv I4 Numeric Maximum servers for this UST maxidle I4 Numeric Maximum idle time, in seconds, for this UST maxreq I4 Numeric Maximum number of requests for this UST The order of servers is undefined. The selection criteria Host , User and/or UST , if present, are combined (using logical AND) and applied to running servers or clients to select the list of servers. Return Values If successful, $status is set to the number (>=0) of returned USERVERS occurrences. Otherwise, see Return Codes . Use Allowed in all Uniface component types. Description The GET_SERVERS operation gets static information about servers registered with the Uniface Router. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
